You are from a small town in the midwest with a population of about 2000. The town of Stockton, Nebraska has a dark secret brewing deep within the woods near the highway used to exit the town. There is a large group of individuals that have lived a secluded lifestyle in the woods. They don't have a particular name. They call themselves 'a family.' THE family.
